roast.excellent: Great eating today! Keep it up — your coach would smile!
roast.good: Solid effort — watch fat and sodium and you're golden!

day.title: {date} details

appGuide.title: App usage guide
appGuide.replayHint: Replay the feature tour, including nutrition label scanning and meal logging.

welcome.title: Welcome to Gorilla Diet Coach
welcome.body:
This quick tour shows you how to log meals, scan nutrition labels, and use the main features.

You can replay it anytime from Settings.

nav.title: Bottom navigation
nav.body:
Five tabs at the bottom:
· Explore — community meal shares
· Home — daily calories and progress
· + Log meal — tap the center button to add food
· Profile — meal history, coach replies, body stats
· Settings — language, reminders, and push notifications

recordMeal.title: Log a meal
recordMeal.body:
Tap the + button or open the log-meal page to:
· Pick a meal type (breakfast, lunch, dinner, etc.)
· Take or upload a food photo
· Search the food database
· Adjust portions with the serving picker

scanLabel.title: Scan nutrition labels
scanLabel.body:
While logging, tap "Scan nutrition label" and point your camera at the facts panel on packaging.

OCR reads calories, protein, carbs, and fat automatically — no manual typing.

aiVerify.title: AI nutrition check
aiVerify.body:
When you save a meal, Gorilla AI reviews your numbers against typical foods and portions.

It adjusts unrealistic entries so your daily progress stays accurate.

home.title: Home dashboard
home.body:
Your home screen shows:
· Calorie and macro ring progress
· Detailed nutrition analysis and AI roast
· Coach broadcast messages
· Logging streak

Tap "Advanced nutrition" for deeper stats.

community.title: Explore community
community.body:
On Explore you can share your meals and browse what other students are eating.

Stay motivated and pick up ideas from the community.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.body:
Profile includes:
· Full meal history and calendar
· Coach sticker reactions on your meals
· Body stats (height, weight, goals)
· Avatar and nickname

settings.title: Settings & reminders
settings.body:
In Settings you can:
· Switch language (Cantonese / Traditional Chinese / English)
· Set water and morning reminder times
· Enable push notifications so you never miss a log

coachInvite.title: Link your coach (invite code)
coachInvite.body:
If you have a coach invite code, enter it at registration to link your coach and gym.

Your coach can then set nutrition targets, review your logs, and send broadcasts.

legal.contactBody: For privacy or account requests, email:
legal.registerConsent: By signing up or logging in you agree to our
legal.deleteWarning: This removes your account, meal logs, body profile, push subscriptions, and related data. This cannot be undone.
legal.deleteCoachWarning: After a coach account is deleted, new students cannot bind via your invite code; existing student data is not deleted.
legal.deleteConfirmDialog: This cannot be undone. Delete your account and all meal logs?
legal.deleteSuccess: Your account has been permanently deleted.
legal.deleteLoginRequired: Please log in before deleting your account.

billing.sectionSubtitle: Pro unlocks advanced nutrition, AI meal suggestions, and unlimited coach students. HK$20/month.
billing.sectionSubtitleDual: Choose the plan that fits you. Secure checkout via Stripe.
billing.successBody: Payment complete. Pro features are unlocked. Returning home...
billing.cancelBody: You cancelled Stripe Checkout. You can upgrade anytime.
